$schema_doc: Phase O4-VPM-INTEGRATION Stream A.3 draft manifest. Lifecycle: Draft Manifest per VBDIP-0002A section 10. NO compiler body ships in this phase; this JSON declares the wrapper shape a future Phase O5 compiler will consume.
name: Player-Side Competitive Record

gamer_address.description: Player wallet address; hashed for privacy in the artifact preimage like CONSENT v1 gamer_address_hash

vhp_token_id.description: Soulbound VAPIVerifiedHumanProof token id bound to the gamer

vhp_expires_at.description: VHP TTL expiration; renders as ACTIVE / EXPIRED status

consecutive_clean_streak.description: Current GIC chain consecutive_clean streak; surfaces as the gamer's grind continuity

gic_chain_length.description: Current GIC chain length; renders GIC_100 milestone badge if >= 100

session_count_30d.description: Live PoAC session count in trailing 30 days; gamer-side activity signal

last_session_ts_ns.description: Most recent session timestamp; gamer can see how fresh their record is

limitations: Gamer-facing competitive record only; not a per-tournament eligibility proof
Surfaces aggregate streak counters; does not expose per-session biometric data

references.registry: VBDIP-0002A section 10 row 2 (PROOF-WALLET-v1 / Player-Side Competitive Record / Gamers / Reserved)

promotion_rules.to_compiler_target: Author scripts/vpm_compile_proof_wallet.py with build_proof_wallet_artifact(...) consuming this exact input schema + a html_renderer that inherits scripts/vpm_visual_grammar.py.
promotion_rules.to_test_fixture: Add bridge/tests/test_phase_o5_vpm_proof_wallet.py with T-VPM-PW-1..8 + T-VPM-GRAMMAR x6 mirroring Phase O4 Stream A.1 test bands.
promotion_rules.to_active: Operator governance ceremony per VBDIP-0002A section 10 lifecycle ladder discipline. Stakeholder-facing artifact; requires player-consent capture flow + GDPR Article 17 verification before Active status.

non_authoritative_notes: This draft manifest is documentation-only. It does not grant runtime authority. It does not modify FROZEN schemas. It does not add Cedar lane permissions. Promotion to Compiler Target requires explicit Phase O5 implementation work; promotion to Active requires governance approval per VBDIP-0002A section 11 G6.
